title: Playtime is Essential
description: Spend at least 15-20 minutes a day playing with your cat using toys like feather wands or laser pointers.

title: Provide Cozy Sleeping Spots
description: Cats love warm, safe, and quiet places. Provide cozy beds or soft blankets in sunny spots.

title: Healthy Treats & Snacks
description: Offer occasional healthy treats or catnip to reward your cat and keep them happy and active.

title: Groom Regularly
description: Brush your cat’s fur regularly to prevent tangles and hairballs, keeping their coat healthy and shiny.

title: Provide Scratching Posts
description: Cats love to scratch. Place scratching posts or pads to keep them entertained and protect your furniture.

title: Quality Time & Affection
description: Spend quiet moments petting or cuddling your cat. Positive interaction builds trust and happiness.
